name: CAREER BANK Co., Ltd.
summary: CAREER BANK Co., Ltd. primarily engages in the dispatching of general workers and fee-charging employment placement business. It operates through Manpower Dispatching, Manpower Dispatching (Kanto), Recruitment, Re-employment Support, Payroll, and Others segments. The company also provides sales outsourcing services; counselling and training services for re-employment; payroll services; and language training services. CAREER BANK Co., Ltd. was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Sapporo, Japan.
